subject: docs(claude-md): fix dangerous update command, add Suggested Implementations
body:
The external CLAUDE.md reference had a curl command that would overwrite
the entire local file, destroying project-specific sections (Project
Status, Architecture, Key State Structures). Changed to a safe diff
command with a warning.

Added three Suggested Implementations patterns adapted from the shared
glow-props standards for Expo/React Native:
- App Icons from SVG Source (Sharp pipeline for Expo icon sizes)
- Timer leak fix patterns (nested setTimeout cleanup)
- Debug System (in-memory event store + overlay for dev phase)

Tags: documentation, claude-md, standards
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: project-standards
Semver: patch

title: fix dangerous update command, add Suggested Implementations
